prerequisites: An Eventee account on a plan that includes the Public API feature
A generated Eventee API token (created under Settings, Features in the Eventee web administration)

authMethods.name: API token
authMethods.summary: Authentication uses a single Eventee API token. Set the connector's required api_token secret field to the token you generate in the Eventee web administration. The connector sends this token on every request to the Eventee public API.

setupSteps.title: Generate an Eventee API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Eventee web administration and open Settings, Features. Enable the Public API feature (available on plans that include it) and generate your API token there.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated token into the connector's required api_token field. The connector uses it to authenticate all calls to the Eventee public API.

sources.title: Eventee integrations and public API (Eventee Help Center)
Features Overview, Public API and API token (Eventee Help Center)
